securityGroups.title: Security Groups
securityGroups.description: Bundle users into groups to grant permissions in bulk.
securityGroups.noGroups: No security groups yet. Create one to get started.
securityGroups.noMembers: No members yet. Add users from this team.
securityGroups.confirmDelete: Delete this group? This will revoke any permissions granted via this group.

clientSharing.title: Sharing
clientSharing.noParticipants: Only the primary team has access. Add participating teams to share this client.
clientSharing.canSeeOtherEntries: Can see time entries from other teams
clientSharing.confirmRemove: Remove this team's access? Their historical time entries will remain but they'll lose access to this client.
clientSharing.noPermissions: No explicit permissions granted. Members have baseline access based on their org.

teamRelationships.title: Team Relationships
teamRelationships.pendingChild: Waiting for the other org to accept
teamRelationships.pendingParent: Invitation to join as a child team

changePrimary.title: Change Primary Team
changePrimary.warning: This transfers ownership of the client to the target team. You must be an owner of the current primary org and a member of the target.
changePrimary.consequence: The current primary team will automatically become a participating team so their time entries continue to work.
